title: 3 things a real brotherhood actually does for you
caption:
A podcast isn't a brother. A Discord server isn't a brother. An online community of 10,000 isn't a brother.

A brother is two or three men who have your number, know your sin, and show up when you're a mess. Not in theory. In practice. In the waiting room. On the 3 AM call.

He names your sin without ending the friendship. He shows up when you're a mess. And he makes you better just by being the kind of man who takes his faith seriously.

If you don't have that — not a group chat, a real brotherhood — that's the most important thing you can build this year.

"Confess your sins to one another, that you may be healed." — James 5:16

Save this for the man who's been doing it alone.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #brotherhood #manofgod #accountability #christianity #realtalk
